body_txt: They coulda been a contender . They coulda been somebody more original, instead of being imitations of Marlon Brando , which is who they are not. A Mumbling Brando will tend to speak in a hesitant drawl, with a few non-verbal grunts thrown in. See No Celebrities Were Harmed for other parodic depictions of real-world celebrities. Contrast with Colonel Kurtz Copy , another trope involving a famous role played by Marlon Brando.
